title: ‘The gov’t plans to write off teenagers,’ said a legislator

replies.msg:
In a press conference, legislator Shiu Ka-chun said that in a meeting about teenager policy and affairs of post-Umbrella Movement a year ago, a scholar who is his friend heard the government would write off teenagers.

Shiu guessed the reason of that speech is because most teenagers are pro-democracy which is incompatible with the government. He condemned that speech and considered the disqualification from Agnes Chow joining the LegCo by-election in 2018 is a proof of that speech.

https://www.hk01.com/社會新聞/153818/周庭被dq-邵家臻引述學者稱-有官員表示要-註銷-一代年輕人#comment_gps
